name: Bintai Kinden Corp. Bhd
summary: Bintai Kinden Corp. Bhd is a Malaysia-based company that provides mechanical and electrical (M&E) engineering services. The company specializes in M&E engineering, procurement, construction, and commissioning (EPCC) for various types of buildings and infrastructure projects. Bintai Kinden Corp. Bhd is headquartered in Kuala Lumpur, Malaysia.
